'''R5-C7''' was an [[R5-series astromech droid]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the droid was present on the streets of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] as [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] hunted down [[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]].<ref name="AotC">{{Film|II}}</ref>
